items.title: Explicit seeded-service booking journey
items.proof_obligation: Browser proof covers selection, valid details, confirmation, duplicate prevention, and clear-and-rebook.

items.title: Accessible initial, invalid, submitting, error, unavailable, confirmed, and revisit states
items.proof_obligation: Browser and accessibility reports cover every declared state, keyboard focus, and announcements.

items.title: Same-browser durable confirmation reference
items.proof_obligation: A valid PB- record survives reload; malformed/storage-failure paths never claim success.

items.title: Exact deployed SHA identity
items.proof_obligation: Live identity JSON contains proofbook and the full canonical SHA; mismatch and placeholder checks fail.

items.title: Warm editorial responsive proof moment
items.proof_obligation: Ready and confirmed screenshots at 390x844 and 1440x900 pass DESIGN.md review with no overflow.

items.title: WCAG 2.2 AA interaction floor
items.proof_obligation: No critical automated violations; manual keyboard, visible-focus, error, busy, and confirmation checks pass.

items.title: Local-only customer data and safe rendering
items.proof_obligation: Security report confirms no external data transmission or third-party runtime and malformed storage is inert.

items.title: Small fast static experience
items.proof_obligation: Mobile Lighthouse is at least 90 with LCP <=2.5s, CLS <=0.1, and product payload <100 KiB.

items.title: Claims stay inside fixture capability
items.proof_obligation: CEO digest and product eval state same-browser/static limitations and imply no excluded fulfillment capability.

items.title: Exact-SHA live post-deploy proof
items.proof_obligation: Live preview, deployment record, post-deploy customer journey, and identity smoke all reference one SHA.
